title: Drop2Inv
description:
This mod adds the function of receiving block and mob drops directly into the inventory without the item falling to the ground.

Not affiliated with Drop2Inv plugin.
body:
# 📦 Drop to Inventory Mod

This mod allows blocks and mob drops to go **directly into your inventory**, preventing items from falling to the ground.

> ⚠️ Not affiliated with the Drop2Inventory plugin

---

## 🌳 Features

- 📥 **Direct Drops**  
  Blocks, mobs and crops drop items straight into your inventory.

- 🌲 **Tree Capitator**  
  Breaking a log destroys the entire tree.

- 🌿 **Stacked Plants Harvesting**  
  Works with:
  - Sugar cane  
  - Bamboo  
  - Cactus  
  - Kelp  
  - Chorus plants  

  ➜ Breaking one block collects **all identical blocks above it directly into your inventory**.

---

## 🎮 Compatibility

- ✔️ Works in **single-player worlds only**

---
